headline: The Retirement Portfolio That Pays You Without Demanding Constant Attention
summary: A $60,000 retirement paycheck sounds like a single target, but a portfolio can produce it in very different ways. A lower-yield portfolio demands more capital upfront but may give the income room to grow. A high-yield portfolio can shrink the capital requirement, but it usually asks the investor to accept more credit risk, distribution risk, ... The Retirement Portfolio That Pays You Without Demanding Constant Attention

headline: IYRI: My Favorite 10%+ Yield Way To Invest In REITs
summary: Explore why inflation turns REIT yields negative and how IYRI captures the REIT factor without yield drag. Read the full analysis here on IYRI.
